message:
feat(moe): add CSR loader and hybrid mode infrastructure

Add runtime support for hybrid Q2_K + sparse outlier mode:

- Add hybrid_mode_enabled flag and CSR buffer arrays (768 tensors)
- Add loadHybridCSR() to load CSR data from hybrid.csr file
- Parse tensor names to map CSR data to layer/expert/projection
- Create Metal buffers for row_ptr, col_idx, values per tensor

Memory layout for hybrid mode:
- 256 gate CSR buffers (32 layers × 8 experts)
- 256 up CSR buffers
- 256 down CSR buffers
- Each buffer triple: row_ptr, col_idx, values

Usage:
  if (try moe_engine.loadHybridCSR("model-hybrid.csr")) {
      // Hybrid mode enabled, use Q2_K sparse kernels
  }
